title: [codereview] After renaming in messages.py, scheduler.py and tests still reference old current_channel kwarg and attribute
description: The field rename in AnnounceMessage broke constructor calls in scheduler.py:176,193 and various tests. Also update docstrings, comments in other files for consistency with CCP-9 rx_channel. Tag: codereview. Parent: project-LICHEN-dp4j.2
close_reason: Fixed all current_channel -> rx_channel renames in messages.py, scheduler.py, tests; updated validation to 0-7, all docs/comments. Fixed E501 lint (new bead wzpz). 3 clean codereview passes: correctness (tests pass, interop with Rust), security (signed rx_channel), robustness (copy in with_incremented). Ruff and pytest clean.
